video_details.title: 15 Years of Trading Risk Management in 20 Minutes
video_details.description:
Without proper trading risk management, I wouldn’t have made $100M+ as a full-time trader. When you learn to trade, you have to learn trading psychology and trading risk management to be successful. This video will cover how I handle risk in my trading, how to calculate the risk-reward ratio before every trade, and mistakes to avoid in trading.

✅ Join my trading course ➡️: https://theonelanceb.com/

🐂 All free content is sponsored by Clear Street, my broker of choice! https://tinyurl.com/ClearSt-Lance
---------------------------------------------
📱Follow my socials:
X: https://x.com/TheOneLanceB 
Insta: https://www.instagram.com/TheOneLanceB
---------------------------------------------
🎥 Watch These Next:
How I Lost $2M in 1 Trade: https://youtu.be/5wxNwS-FtZQ
The Art of Betting Big: https://youtu.be/tIB72PAeZLU
---------------------------------------------
If you’re new to my channel, my name is Lance Breitstein. I spent over a decade trading equities at Trillium, setting the record for highest PNL in a single year as their Top Trader. I trained dozens of traders to become successes while managing Trillium’s Chicago office. With over $100m in verified profits, I now spend my time focused on turning good traders into greats and greats into GOATs. Advisor to SMB Capital and mentor of 7- and 8-figure PER YEAR traders. I am to be profiled in the next edition of Jack Schwager’s Market Wizards.

The journey is never easy. Trading is one of the most difficult, but most rewarding jobs imaginable. I am here to help you on your path, wherever that leads you.

May you want it bad enough to overcome any obstacles.
-(The One) Lance B
---------------------------------------------
Chapters:
00:00 15 Years of Trading Risk Management
00:31 Have a Daily Loss Limit
02:09 Every Trade Needs a Stop Loss
02:55 Never Let Goals Dictate Risk
04:12 Never Be At Risk of Game Over
05:35 Position Sizing
07:20 Make the Most of Your Trade Setups
08:37 Build a Drawdown Protocol
09:18 Protect Your Mental Capital
10:39 Risk Management = Iteration
13:36 Expected Value Drives Decisions
14:19 Beware of Shorting
15:41 Never Risk So Much It Hurts Your Psychology
16:40 Don’t Extrapolate Your Growth Linearly
18:11 Build Systems That Enforce Discipline 
19:13 Risk Never Disappears
